prompt: Map out the skill discovery and routing system in this plugin. How does the prism meta-skill route to phase-specific skills?
assertions: Output file exists at the specified outputs/research.md path
Document references YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md files (name, description, model fields)
Document references the prism meta-skill routing mechanism
Document has required template sections (Research Question/Summary/Files Discovered/Component Analysis)
Document contains file:line references to skill SKILL.md files
Document does NOT contain improvement suggestions or critiques
Output was saved to .prism/ directory structure
